untranslatable_reason: This signal is a meta-rule about system design (combining patterns + exits + position sizing) rather than a tradeable entry/exit condition. It requires validation of backtested components (min 50 trades, expectancy threshold, risk management integration) which cannot be expressed as price-action indicators or technical conditions. The actual trading logic depends on three external rule definitions (pattern, exit rule, position sizing) that must be specified separately. No actionable technical conditions can be extracted from this text.
translation_notes: THARP_DRY_18_1 is a framework rule emphasizing system integration rather than a standalone pattern. Implementation requires: (1) Define a specific entry pattern with technical conditions, (2) Define an exit rule with technical conditions, (3) Define position sizing rule with max 2% risk per trade, (4) Backtest combined system with minimum 50 trades. Only after these external rules are defined and validated can the actual trading signal be converted to JSON.
